title: Executive Order 5838—Withdrawal of Public Lands in Aid of Legislation, Oregon
text:
Under authority of the act of Congress approved June 25, 1910 (36 Stat. 847-848), as amended by the act of August 24, 1912 (37 Stat. 497), it is hereby ordered that the NW. ¼ NE. ¼ sec. 15, T. 3 S., R. 6 WWillamette meridian, Oregon, containing 40 acres, be, and it is hereby, temporarily withdrawn from settlement, location, sale, or entry, except as provided in said acts, in aid of proposed legislation.
This order shall continue in full force and effect unless and until revoked by the President or by act of Congress.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
April 18, 1932.
